title: Best Practices
subtitle: Optimal application scenarios for empowering customer business

items.title: Geological Disaster Data Graph
items.description: Building an intelligent data platform that integrates distributed static baseline data and dynamic monitoring data, achieving deep correlation analysis and visual graph display.

items.title: Intelligent Emergency Command Platform
items.description: Building an intelligent decision-making command and dispatch platform that integrates cross-domain data resources, achieving integrated support for disaster early warning, resource dispatch, and emergency decision-making.

items.title: Public Safety Intelligence Analysis
items.description: Through deep application of large model technology, achieving intelligent case fusion analysis and real-time research decision-making, building a precise and efficient safety prevention system.
